mundo.titulo: Starmer warns leadership contest would 'plunge us into chaos' in pleas to ministers and MPs
mundo.resumen: Sir Keir battles to save his job, as Health Secretary Wes Streeting is thought to be plotting a leadership challenge potentially as early as Thursday.

mundo.titulo: Chris Mason: Big moment ahead for Streeting to decide whether to go for it
mundo.resumen: There is a big moment coming in the next 24 hours, for Sir Keir Starmer and for would-be challengers to the prime minister.

mundo.titulo: Watch: What next after the King's Speech?
mundo.resumen: BBC Chief Political Correspondent Henry Zeffman explains what is next for the government after the King's Speech.

mundo.titulo: Drug addiction counsellor sentenced in Matthew Perry's overdose death
mundo.resumen: The drug counsellor was one of five people accused of supplying ketamine to Perry and exploiting his drug addiction.

mundo.titulo: Farage faces standards probe into £5m gift from crypto billionaire
mundo.resumen: The probe will examine whether the Reform UK leader should have declared the gift from crypto billionaire.

mundo.titulo: Met Police prepares armoured vehicles and 4,000 officers for dual London protests
mundo.resumen: It comes as a Unite the Kingdom rally is taking place in central London on the same day as the annual Nakba march.

negocios.titulo: Trump's Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh confirmed by US Senate
negocios.resumen: Kevin Warsh was confirmed by the narrowest margin since the role required a Senate confirmation vote.

negocios.titulo: Tui sees summer sales fall 10% due to cautious UK customers
negocios.resumen: The travel operator says customers are delaying booking holidays over Iran war concerns.

negocios.titulo: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
negocios.resumen: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

negocios.titulo: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
negocios.resumen: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

negocios.titulo: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
negocios.resumen: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".

negocios.titulo: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
negocios.resumen: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

tecnologia.titulo: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
tecnologia.resumen: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

tecnologia.titulo: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
tecnologia.resumen: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

tecnologia.titulo: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
tecnologia.resumen: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

tecnologia.titulo: This is what some the world’s largest banks of malware look like stacked as hard drives
tecnologia.resumen: What would some of the world's largest repositories of malware look like if they were stacked as hard drives, one on top of the other?

tecnologia.titulo: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
tecnologia.resumen: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

tecnologia.titulo: X launches a History tab for bookmarks, likes, videos, and articles
tecnologia.resumen: X’s new History tab combines bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single place, expanding the app’s role as a save-it-for-later tool.

tecnologia.titulo: Microsoft’s Edge Copilot update uses AI to pull information from across your tabs
tecnologia.resumen: Microsoft Edge is adding a new feature that will allow its Copilot AI chatbot to gather information from all of your open tabs. tecnologia.titulo: Trump administration defends right to ban content moderation experts from US
tecnologia.resumen: The Trump administration is fighting for the right to keep some social media moderation advocates out of the US. tecnologia.titulo: YouTube is courting creators — and sponsors — with streaming shows
tecnologia.resumen: In the ongoing fight for content and talent, YouTube is pitching itself as the connector between the creators and advertisers - and marketing its creators not just as the future of social media, but also of advertising, TV, streaming, and entertainment more broadly. tecnologia.titulo: AMD’s best CPU tech for gamers is coming to workstations too
tecnologia.resumen: For the first time, AMD is including its 3D V-Cache tech in its commercial workstation processors with a refreshed line of Ryzen PRO 9000 series chips. tecnologia.titulo: Fighting Trump will make or break Disney’s new CEO
tecnologia.resumen: A week ago, newly appointed Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro was busy regaling investors with plans to turn Disney Plus into the company's "digital centerpiece."
